name: East-West Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Shanghai bok choy, cut bottoms and separate leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok, heat 3 tablespoons olive oil.
2. Add steak, 1/4 teaspoon each of seasoned salt and garlic salt, 2 tablespoons of oyster sauce, and 1/4 cup of Chinese wine.
3. Stir fry until the steak is medium-rare.
4. Place the steak in a large serving dish.
5. In the same wok, heat the remaining 3 tablespoons olive oil.
6. Add the bok choy, the remaining 1/4 teaspoon seasoned salt and garlic salt, the remaining 2 tablespoons oyster sauce, and the remaining 1/4 cup Chinese wine.
7. Cover and simmer for a minute or until leaves are wilted.
8. Place bok choy on top of the steak.
9. Serve hot. Makes 4 servings.
